name: HRA_EVAL_MESSAGES
description: This table stores the validation messages of performance documents as a result of Mass Evaluation Submit Process.

columns.Name: EVAL_MESSAGE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the primary key of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: EVALUATION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the document identifier of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the manager identifier of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: TMPL_PERIOD_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the template period identifier of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: EVAL_PARTICIPANT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the participant identifier in the document.

columns.Name: TMPL_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the template section identifier of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: EVAL_SECTION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the document section identifier of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: SECTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the document section type code identifier of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Stores the validation message level of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the validation message type of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: MESSAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the validation message code of the performance document validation messages.

columns.Name: REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Enterprise Service Scheduler: indicates the request ID of the job that created or last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
